title: Living in Boulder vlog 9 -  2 - 2017: Rode 4:24:22, Strava Screen Captures, Peloponesian War,

enrichment.summary: Kyle records a casual evening vlog on September 2nd from Boulder, covering a stationary bike ride (noting his computer/Garmin may be malfunctioning with odd speed/wattage readings), smoking weed for what he says is the last time, and a Google Earth project mapping the Augustinian regions of ancient Rome. He also mentions his girlfriend calling, watching something together, and plans to continue building out Boulder in Google Earth.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: says this is the last time he'll get high, done with it
excited about mapping Augustinian regions, believes nobody has done it before and sees it as uniquely valuable
acknowledges he's out of shape but riding every day to build back up, expects to tire out soon

entities: Peloponnesian War (title reference only, not discussed)
